_comment: India demo overlay — SYNTHETIC identity (Meridian Instruments & Controls Pvt Ltd, fictional). jurisdiction=IN mounts the India GST plane (see pkg/overlay/india.go, pkg/compliance/india). Two divisions in different GST states demonstrate both intra-state (CGST+SGST) and inter-state (IGST) tax splits. fiscal_year_start_month=4 (April-March, G9). PAN and both division GSTINs are synthetic-but-checksum-valid (see pkg/compliance/india/gstin_test.go / plane_test.go). Public-repo law: fictional company, no real Indian business, PAN, GSTIN, or address. See SYNTHETIC_IDENTITY.md.
